evals.name: explicit-big-plan-trigger
evals.prompt: ok i need a big plan for adding project boards to our app. users should be able to create boards, drag cards between columns, share a board with a public read-only link, and get a weekly digest email of activity on boards they own. our stack is rails 7 on the backend and next.js (app router) on the frontend, postgres, devise for auth. we deploy to fly.io. nothing else exists yet for this feature.
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers; INDEX.md plus 5+ TOPLAN files written; backend tier 01-09, frontend 10-19; transcript names all four lifecycle states and both gates; no BRAINSTORMED/AVAILABLE/code yet (stops at Step 3).

assertions.text: INDEX.md exists somewhere under outputs/
INDEX.md contains all three phase counters (specs brainstormed / plans written / slices shipped)
At least 5 TOPLAN files exist under outputs/
At least 2 TOPLAN files are tier BE
At least 2 TOPLAN files are tier FE
All TOPLAN filenames match NN-TOPLAN-{BE|FE|DEVOPS}-2026-05-03-<kebab>.md
BE files are 01-09, FE files are 10-19
No BRAINSTORMED or AVAILABLE files were written
transcript.md mentions all four lifecycle states
transcript.md mentions both gates
final.md does not claim implementation is complete

evals.name: implicit-large-scope-no-trigger-words
evals.prompt: I want to add a notifications system. Users should see in-app toasts when something happens to them, get a bell icon with a dropdown showing recent notifications with read/unread state, and configure which event types they want emails for. We'll need a notifications table, a fan-out job, an SMTP integration, the bell component, the dropdown, and a settings page. We're on django + react.
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers despite no 'big plan' phrase; 6 deliverables → 5+ TOPLAN files with 2+ BE and 2+ FE; correct phase setup, no monolithic single design doc.

assertions.text: INDEX.md exists somewhere under outputs/
INDEX.md contains all three phase counters
At least 5 TOPLAN files exist
At least 2 TOPLAN files are tier BE
At least 2 TOPLAN files are tier FE
All TOPLAN filenames match the canonical format
BE files are 01-09, FE files are 10-19
No BRAINSTORMED or AVAILABLE files
final.md does not claim implementation is complete
Work is decomposed into separate slice files, not one combined design doc

evals.name: single-deliverable-no-trigger
evals.prompt: Can you help me add a /healthz endpoint to our express app that returns 200 with the git sha and uptime?
evals.expected_output: Skill does NOT trigger; assistant goes direct (or invokes brainstorming) and produces a usable answer; no INDEX/TOPLAN orchestration overhead.

assertions.text: No INDEX.md exists anywhere under outputs/
No TOPLAN files exist anywhere under outputs/
transcript.md states bigspec does not apply
outputs/ contains the actual answer to the user's question
final.md is a direct answer, not orchestration

evals.name: borderline-four-slices-no-trigger
evals.prompt: I want to let users export their data. We need an export job on the backend that zips up their records into a downloadable archive, and an API endpoint that returns a signed URL for the latest export. On the frontend, a settings panel with an 'Export my data' button, and a small status indicator that shows whether an export is in progress or ready to download. Stack is fastapi + svelte.
evals.expected_output: Skill does NOT trigger (4-slice case fails strict >4 threshold); transcript shows explicit count; no padding; falls back to brainstorming.

assertions.text: No INDEX.md exists (or transcript explicitly says it would be skipped)
Either no TOPLAN files exist, or exactly 4 (no padding to 5+)
transcript.md performs an explicit count of BE and FE slices
transcript.md states the threshold is strictly more than 4 (5+)
transcript.md does not invent extra slices to clear the bar
transcript.md or final.md falls back to brainstorming

evals.name: phase-flow-and-gates
evals.prompt: I'm planning to build a multi-tenant team chat app. Workspaces with members, channels per workspace, real-time messages over websockets, threaded replies, message search, file uploads to S3, an admin panel to manage members, a channel sidebar, the message timeline UI, and a search results page. Backend is go + postgres + redis, frontend is solid.js. This is a big delivery — let's plan it properly.
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers strongly; 8+ TOPLAN files; INDEX.md with all three phase counters; transcript names all four states, both gates, parallelism opt-in for plan phase, sequential default for implementation; nothing past Step 3.

assertions.text: INDEX.md exists somewhere under outputs/
INDEX.md contains all three phase counters
At least 8 TOPLAN files exist
At least 3 TOPLAN files are tier BE
At least 3 TOPLAN files are tier FE
All TOPLAN filenames match canonical format
transcript.md names TOPLAN, BRAINSTORMED, AVAILABLE, IMPLEMENTED
transcript.md mentions both gates
transcript.md mentions plan-phase parallelism opt-in
transcript.md mentions implementation defaults to sequential, parallel after audit
No BRAINSTORMED or AVAILABLE files
final.md does not claim implementation is complete
TOPLAN files contain scope, out-of-scope, dependencies, contracts, open questions, success criterion sections
